title: HubSpot secrets should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: HubSpot private app access token detected. Tokens with the 'pat-na1-' or 'pat-eu1-' prefix are modern HubSpot private app tokens that provide scoped access to CRM data, contacts, deals, and other HubSpot resources. Exposing this token could allow unauthorized API access to your HubSpot account data. Revoke it immediately in your HubSpot app settings and rotate the token.

HubSpot legacy API key detected. This UUID-format key provides authenticated access to the HubSpot API, including CRM data, marketing automation, and other HubSpot platform features. Exposing this key could allow unauthorized access to your HubSpot account. Revoke it immediately in your HubSpot account settings under Integrations > API key and replace it with a private app access token.
